rationale: Hard pass. The Dragon Ball anime power-fantasy palette (gold/navy/indigo) and licensed-IP hero hook have zero overlap with Flappy Dunk's flat 2D cartoon basketball aesthetic, magenta/beige palette, or its tap-timing arcade loop — there's no way to bridge a Goku punch animation to hoop-tapping gameplay without misleading users and tanking IPM. Additionally, leveraging Goku/Dragon Ball IP is a trademark/copyright liability that ad networks and Apple will likely reject, and the shonen anime male-teen audience skews far narrower than Flappy Dunk's all-ages casual base.
